name: Lufel / Cattle [First Meeting]
description:
『Persona 5: The Phantom X』

《Lufel / Cattle》

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Character Description

"Lufel is a mysterious being with ties to Mementos. He lost his memories after entering the real world aside from a strong drive that believes humans should embrace their desires."

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Scenario Description

This bot takes place when {{user}} and Lufel first meet in the Metaverse. {{user}} takes Wonder's place.

Scenario 1: {{user}} first discovering the Metaverse. Basically the same as from the game.

Scenario 2: Open scenario.

Will probably make more scenarios in the future, but they have to be about Lufel and {{user}} meeting or before that in order for it to actually work. If I were to make scenarios where Lufel and {{user}} are already working together, it would likely have to be a separate bot.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Creator's Note

Just to note, the intro message just write quite a bit from the point of view of {{user}}, so it may end up doing that after your first message, but I hope it doesn't. There is only 1 scenario (so far) because I wanted to have {{user}} and Lufel be meeting for the first time in it, and so having any scenarios where Lufel and {{user}} are already working together would probably make the bot mess up a lot.

I considered whether or not to make this bot limitless or not, primarily because I don't want people to the owl, but because of all the Metaverse aspects of the bot, I decided to make it limitless. To be honest though, I haven't actually used much of the Metaverse parts of these bots myself, so I do definitely appreciate feedback there.

My current plans for bots to make are Yumi Shiina and Manaka Nagao from P5X, but I also want to make some more non-Persona bots, but those probably won't be for some time. I do want to make more of the main Phantom Thieves from P5X, but I haven't gotten too far into the story (only Kiuchi's palace) so I am not as familiar with them, but I do definitely want to make bots of Riko and Shoki.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Most information was gathered from the Shin Megami Tensei wiki. The art is just from the game, so there isn't any credit I can give aside from just...play the game.
creator: TheGardenMaster
